data.body: MERGED + LIVE. Automated Jira<->rebar sync to REB is operational: reconcile-bridge.yml (*/20) + reconcile-bridge-canary.yml + docs/jira-sync-setup.md all on main (#20). Repo vars/secret wired (JIRA_URL/USER/PROJECT, ACLI_VERSION/SHA256, JIRA_API_TOKEN). Validated CI job end-to-end: reconcile-check -> dry-run (0 DIG) -> live (applied 404/404, converged). Store re-targeted from DIG to REB (bug 626d) and bulk-synced; 355 REB bindings recorded. Follow-ups: assignee churn 9b94; bulk-sync timeout raised to 60m (#23). Bridge auto-runs every 20m and is healthy.
